<!-- Brief description of the change -->

## Type of change
- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructure
- [ ] `style` — Formatting only
- [ ] `content` — Content/CMS update
- [ ] `chore` — Build/tooling
- [ ] `ci` — Pipeline change
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation

## Checklist
- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Formatting passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport (320px)
- [ ] Tested on desktop viewport (1440px)
- [ ] No hardcoded text (all from config)
- [ ] Images have alt text
- [ ] Commit messages follow convention
